params.to: Last index to return (inclusive). Capped to length-1.

params.contractTested: Address of the contract exercised in the test.
params.gasUsed: Gas used by the test transaction (caller-supplied).
params.note: Optional note, e.g. revert reason on failure.

returns.resultId: Storage index of the newly appended result.

getResult(uint256).notice: Fetch a single result by its storage index.

getResultCount().notice: Total number of results logged so far.

getResults(uint256,uint256).notice: Fetch a paginated slice of results (inclusive range).

getResultsByTester(address).notice: Return all results logged by a specific tester address.         Gas-unbounded — intended for off-chain / frontend reads only.

logResult(address,bytes4,bool,uint256,st.notice: Log the result of a single test transaction.

documentation.text:
@dev Emitted on every logged result. Indexed fields allow the frontend
      to filter efficiently by tester, contract, or pass/fail status.
